menu.name: Classic Margherita
menu.description: Hand-stretched dough, crushed San Marzano tomatoes, fresh mozzarella, basil, olive oil.

menu.name: Spicy Pepperoni
menu.description: Cup-and-char pepperoni with hot honey drizzle on a crispy-bottom crust.
